title: DELETE with TRIGGER causes an assertion fault
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t3 USING rtree(a,b,c);

CREATE TRIGGER t2del AFTER DELETE ON t2 WHEN (SELECT 1 from t1) BEGIN 
  DELETE FROM t3 WHERE a=old.y;
key_bug_features: DELETE with TRIGGER on WITHOUT ROWID tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE fuzz_sqlite_t3 USING rtree(a,b,c);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_t2del AFTER DELETE ON fuzz_sqlite_t2 WHEN (SELECT 1 FROM fuzz_sqlite_t1) BEGIN DELETE FROM fuzz_sqlite_t3 WHERE a = old.y; END;
